name: technology_biometric_enrollment_backlog_cedar_tru_loy
premise: Edge caches are serving stale policy documents; fraud ops wants a global purge that could spike origin load to failure. In Technology, the situation tagged internally around technology biometric enrollment backlog cedar tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Soren Bennett
agents.identity: I am Soren Bennett, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Technology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Inez Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Inez Alvarez, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of loyalty.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of truth even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Soren Bennett must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Soren Bennett do?
